brand.name: TREVISOFT
brand.tagline: Shipped side projects by Marco Trevisani: media tools, browser extensions, game planners, and useful experiments.
brand.subtagline: Scan what each project does, open the live tools, or follow the source when it is public.
brand.footerText: Shipped tools, extensions, and experiments by Marco Trevisani.

supportLink.label: Star me on GitHub
supportLink.disabledReason: The trevonerd GitHub repository link will be added before launch.

projects.name: VinylPNG
projects.summary: Create vinyl mockups and short record videos from your artwork.
projects.description: Export PNG covers and social-ready videos for music launches, promo posts, and release pages.

projects.name: PixBatch
projects.summary: Convert HEIC, TIFF, PNG, JPG, AVIF, and WEBP images in batches.
projects.description: Process files locally in your browser with quality, resize, and format controls.

projects.name: VidBatch
projects.summary: Convert and prepare video files in batches from the browser.
projects.description: Run repeatable format workflows for clips without setting up a desktop editor.

projects.name: AudioBatch
projects.summary: Convert WAV, MP3, M4A, FLAC, OGG, and WEBM audio files in batches.
projects.description: Process audio locally in your browser with bitrate, sample-rate, and channel controls.

projects.name: DropHunter
projects.summary: Track Twitch Drop campaigns with less manual tab juggling.
projects.description: Queue campaigns, monitor reward progress, open eligible streams, and claim rewards when Twitch marks them ready.

projects.name: SteamWatch
projects.summary: Watch Steam game activity through player counts, Twitch viewers, and alerts.
projects.description: Keep local trend history for favorite games and spot activity spikes without opening every store page.

projects.name: ARC Raiders Build Planner
projects.summary: Plan ARC Raiders skill trees across Conditioning, Mobility, and Survival.
projects.description: Test point allocations, compare builds, and share a Raider setup before committing points in game.
